name: @catetus/web
description: Public landing page + SplatBench leaderboard for Catetus.

scripts.dev: node scripts/sync-data.mjs && node scripts/build-explore-index.mjs && node scripts/sync-viewer-dist.mjs && astro dev
scripts.build: node scripts/sync-data.mjs && node scripts/build-explore-index.mjs && node scripts/sync-viewer-dist.mjs && astro check && astro build
scripts.lint: node scripts/sync-data.mjs && node scripts/build-explore-index.mjs && node scripts/sync-viewer-dist.mjs && astro check
